data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'real-time itinerary updates', but the evidence does not explicitly confirm that real-time updates are being provided or tracked. While the linked use case mentions that the system coordinates timing and adjusts for delays, it does not provide concrete evidence of real-time updates being communicated to users or stakeholders. Therefore, there is a gap in the evidence regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of real-time updates being communicated to users.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
